title: Job Application Jumpscare
description: Replaces the new end flash with a job application
body:
# Have you ever wanted to be constantly bombarded by job application PNGs?

Well now you can! This resource pack replaces the new end flash with a job application to remind you every time you are in the end to seek employment!
![Frightening. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65009975bbe851c44b630a0e2f625252ac101789.png)
